title: Butterbean Shakshuka
ingredients_html:
• 400 g Chopped tomatoes
  • 120 g Onion
  • 300 g Peppers
  • 12 mL Olive Oil
  • 6 Large Eggs
  • 240 g Butter Beans
  • 75 g Feta Cheese
  • Smoked Paprika
  • Cayenne Pepper
  • Cumin
  • Garlic
  • Salt
  • Pepper
steps_html:
Prep

  1. Dice bell peppers.
  2. Dice tomatoes if applicable.

Cook

  1. Add olive oil to pan and cook down onions.
  2. Add in peppers. Season with smoked paprika, cayenne, cumin, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cook for a few minutes.
  3. Add in chopped tomatoes and butter beans.
  4. Make rough divots in the sauce and crack eggs into the divots.
  5. Cover with a lid and simmer on low until the eggs are cooked, about 6-8 minutes.
  6. Garnish with feta cheese and enjoy!
